case_title: ABDUL RAOUF NAHENAH VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SF PARK AND RECREATION DEPT

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY ABDUL RAOUF NAHENAH AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SF PARK AND RECREATION DEPT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-28-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT.RETURN REC.FOR IRENE CASSERLY.NOT SIGNED BY ADDRESSEE.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ABDUL RAOUF NAHENAH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SF PARK AND RECREATION DEPT $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $13.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $513.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SF PARK AND RECREATION DEPT HEARING SET FOR AUG-20-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO PIEDMONT CHIROPRACTIC CLINIC
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO UNA TUTSON, EMPLOYMNET COUNSELLOR
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF AUG-20-1991, GRANTED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ABDUL RAOUF NAHENAH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SF PARK AND RECREATION DEPT PLAINTIFF FAILED TO SUSTAIN THE BURDEN OF PROOF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
